creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 218948
svn .diff

MixerTUI update 1.2 -> 1.3

Suggestion: https://gitlab.com/alfix/mixertui/-/issues/4

CHANGELOG:

 * add 'p' and 'P' keys to save the profile
 * add '-p <profile>' and '-P <profile>' options to load a <profile>

Testing:
 
 * port test
 * portlint -C
 * poudriere testport -j 121Ramd64 -p default -i -o audio/mixertui
 * poudriere testport -j 130Camd64 -p default -i -o audio/mixertui
